codeReview.summary: Clean extraction of container-level code from state.go and decode.go into new kfx_container.go. All specified symbols were moved correctly, imports cleaned up appropriately, and all 744 tests pass with go vet clean. The code was moved verbatim — no logic changes, no renames, no reformats. The file maps correctly to the Python kfx_container.py module which handles CONT binary parsing and entity deserialization.

summary: The worker correctly followed the go-refactor-worker skill procedure: read source files, created target file with exact copies of moved symbols, cleaned up imports in source files, verified build/test/vet at each step, and committed with a descriptive message referencing the Python alignment. All 9 specified symbols (containerSource, containerBlob, loadContainerSource, loadContainerSourceData, collectContainerBlobs, collectZipContainerBlobs, collectSidecarContainerBlobs, validateEntityOffsets, entityPayload) were moved from state.go (8) and decode.go (1) into the new kfx_container.go. State.go correctly retains all fragment-related types and functions. No behavior changes, no test regressions. Pass.
